title: Clean two-party transfer state
prompt:
In server-side Garry's Mod Lua, transfers is keyed by either player and each value contains peer and lastActivity. Write one reusable cancellation function plus hooks that remove both sides of a transfer when either player disconnects or after 30 seconds of inactivity. Notify a still-valid peer with notifyCancelled(peer). Check timeouts once per second.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: central idempotent two-peer cleanup called from PlayerDisconnected and a bounded periodic inactivity sweep
